title: 读取主机资源容量池
code:
$ns = 'root\virtualization\v2'

# 1) 处理器池是独立类。基类 Msvm_ResourcePool 查询不会多态返回它,
#    因此需直接查询 Msvm_ProcessorPool。
$procPrim = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_ProcessorPool | Where-Object { $_.Primordial } | Select-Object -First 1
# $procPrim.MaxConsumableResource = 主机逻辑处理器数 * 100000 (单位 'percent / 1000')
Write-Host ("ProcPool MaxConsumable={0} Reserved={1} Units='{2}'" -f $procPrim.MaxConsumableResource, $procPrim.Reserved, $procPrim.AllocationUnits)

# 2) 内存 / 以太网 / 存储 / 磁盘池以通用 Msvm_ResourcePool 行暴露,
#    按 ResourceType (RT) 与 ResourceSubType 区分, 每行 Primordial=True。
#    (专用子类 Msvm_MemoryPool / Msvm_EthernetResourcePool /
#     Msvm_StorageResourcePool 在此主机上无实例。)
$pools = @(Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_ResourcePool)
foreach ($p in ($pools | Sort-Object ResourceType)) {
  Write-Host ("  RT={0} SubType='{1}' Primordial={2}" -f $p.ResourceType, $p.ResourceSubType, $p.Primordial)
}

# 内存容量位于 RT=4 池 (单位 'byte * 2^20' = MB)。
$memPool = $pools | Where-Object { $_.ResourceType -eq 4 -and $_.Primordial } | Select-Object -First 1
Write-Host ("MemPool(RT=4) MaxConsumable={0}MB Reserved={1}MB" -f $memPool.MaxConsumableResource, $memPool.Reserved)

# 3) 主机各资源类型能力表。
$allCaps = @(Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_AllocationCapabilities)
$allCaps | Group-Object ResourceType | Sort-Object { [int]$_.Name } | ForEach-Object {
  $subs = ($_.Group | ForEach-Object { $_.ResourceSubType }) -join '; '
  Write-Host ("  RT={0} count={1} [{2}]" -f $_.Name, $_.Count, $subs)
}
Write-Host ("pools={0} allocCaps={1}" -f $pools.Count, $allCaps.Count)
code_en:
$ns = 'root\virtualization\v2'

# 1) The processor pool is a dedicated class. A base-class Msvm_ResourcePool query does not return it polymorphically,
#    so Msvm_ProcessorPool must be queried directly.
$procPrim = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_ProcessorPool | Where-Object { $_.Primordial } | Select-Object -First 1
# $procPrim.MaxConsumableResource = number of host logical processors * 100000 (units 'percent / 1000')
Write-Host ("ProcPool MaxConsumable={0} Reserved={1} Units='{2}'" -f $procPrim.MaxConsumableResource, $procPrim.Reserved, $procPrim.AllocationUnits)

# 2) Memory / Ethernet / storage / disk pools are exposed as generic Msvm_ResourcePool rows,
#    distinguished by ResourceType (RT) and ResourceSubType, with each row Primordial=True.
#    (The dedicated subclasses Msvm_MemoryPool / Msvm_EthernetResourcePool /
#     Msvm_StorageResourcePool have no instances on this host.)
$pools = @(Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_ResourcePool)
foreach ($p in ($pools | Sort-Object ResourceType)) {
  Write-Host ("  RT={0} SubType='{1}' Primordial={2}" -f $p.ResourceType, $p.ResourceSubType, $p.Primordial)
}

# Memory capacity resides in the RT=4 pool (units 'byte * 2^20' = MB).
$memPool = $pools | Where-Object { $_.ResourceType -eq 4 -and $_.Primordial } | Select-Object -First 1
Write-Host ("MemPool(RT=4) MaxConsumable={0}MB Reserved={1}MB" -f $memPool.MaxConsumableResource, $memPool.Reserved)

# 3) Capability tables for each host resource type.
$allCaps = @(Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_AllocationCapabilities)
$allCaps | Group-Object ResourceType | Sort-Object { [int]$_.Name } | ForEach-Object {
  $subs = ($_.Group | ForEach-Object { $_.ResourceSubType }) -join '; '
  Write-Host ("  RT={0} count={1} [{2}]" -f $_.Name, $_.Count, $subs)
}
Write-Host ("pools={0} allocCaps={1}" -f $pools.Count, $allCaps.Count)
output:
=== Msvm_ProcessorPool (dedicated class) ===
Primordial: Capacity=2400000 MaxConsumable=2400000 Reserved=0 Units='percent / 1000' SubType='Microsoft:Hyper-V:Processor' RT=3
  => host logical processors ~= 24 (MaxConsumable/100000)

=== Msvm_ResourcePool (generic primordial pools) ===  (23 rows, all Primordial=True)
  RT=1   ; RT=4 Memory; RT=6 SCSI; RT=7 SynthFC; RT=10 Synth/Emulated Ethernet; RT=13 Keyboard/Mouse/Serial; RT=16 DVD; RT=17 Synth/Physical Disk; RT=24 Display; RT=31 VHD/CD-DVD/Floppy; RT=33 Ethernet Connection; RT=32768 Storage LU; RT=32769 vPCIe; RT=32770 GPU Partition; RT=32771 PMEM; RT=32772 Flexible IO; RT=64764 FibreChannel Connection
Total generic pools=23 Primordial=23

Memory pool (RT=4): MaxConsumable=46098 Reserved=12800 Units='byte * 2^20'

=== Dedicated pool subclasses (instance counts) ===
  Msvm_MemoryPool = 0
  Msvm_EthernetResourcePool = 0
  Msvm_StorageResourcePool = 0

=== Msvm_AllocationCapabilities (host capability rows) ===
  RT=1..64764, 18 distinct ResourceType groups, 25 rows total
  (e.g. RT=3 Processor, RT=4 Memory, RT=6 SCSI, RT=10 x2 Ethernet, RT=13 x3, RT=17 x2, RT=24 x2 incl Synthetic 3D Display, RT=31 x3)
Total AllocationCapabilities rows=25

RESULT: PASS (procPoolMax=2400000, genericPools=23, primordial=23, allocCaps=25)
notes: 纯读操作，不创建任何虚拟机。
Msvm_ProcessorPool 是独立类，Get-WmiObject -Class Msvm_ResourcePool 不会多态返回它（基类枚举结果的 __CLASS 均为 Msvm_ResourcePool，不含处理器池 RT=3）。查询处理器池须单独调用 Msvm_ProcessorPool。
专用子类 Msvm_MemoryPool / Msvm_EthernetResourcePool / Msvm_StorageResourcePool 可能没有实例；内存、网络、存储池通常以通用 Msvm_ResourcePool 行表示（RT=4 内存、RT=10 以太网、RT=31 VHD 等）。
处理器原始池：MaxConsumableResource 单位为 'percent / 1000'，等于逻辑处理器数 ×100000。
内存原始池（RT=4）：MaxConsumable 与 Reserved 单位为 'byte * 2^20'（即 MB），分别表示主机可消费内存与已预留内存。
读取主机资源池的正确入口是 Msvm_ResourcePool（通用）+ Msvm_ProcessorPool（专用）+ Msvm_AllocationCapabilities（每资源类型的能力表）。
每个池经 Msvm_ElementCapabilities 关联到对应的 Msvm_AllocationCapabilities，描述该资源类型的 min/max/default/increment。
notes_en: This is a read-only operation and creates no VM.

Msvm_ProcessorPool is a dedicated class, and Get-WmiObject -Class Msvm_ResourcePool does not return it polymorphically (the __CLASS of every base-class enumeration result is Msvm_ResourcePool, excluding the processor pool RT=3). Querying the processor pool requires a separate call to Msvm_ProcessorPool.

The dedicated subclasses Msvm_MemoryPool / Msvm_EthernetResourcePool / Msvm_StorageResourcePool may have no instances; the memory, network, and storage pools are typically represented as generic Msvm_ResourcePool rows (RT=4 Memory, RT=10 Ethernet, RT=31 VHD, etc.).
Processor primordial pool: MaxConsumableResource has units of 'percent / 1000', equal to the number of logical processors x100000.
Memory primordial pool (RT=4): MaxConsumable and Reserved have units of 'byte * 2^20' (i.e. MB), representing the host consumable memory and the reserved memory respectively.
The correct entry points for reading host resource pools are Msvm_ResourcePool (generic) + Msvm_ProcessorPool (dedicated) + Msvm_AllocationCapabilities (the capability table per resource type).
Each pool is associated via Msvm_ElementCapabilities to the corresponding Msvm_AllocationCapabilities, which describes the min/max/default/increment for that resource type.
